title: Lush Broiled Algerian Pea Eggplant Tagine
description: A deeply savory vegetarian tagine featuring fermented pea eggplants and aromatic North African spices finished under a high broiler for a charred crust.
instructions: Preheat your oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit and prepare a heavy clay tagine or cast iron skillet.
Whisk together the olive oil, tomato paste, garlic, ras el hanout, and harissa in a small bowl.
Toss the pea eggplants in the spice mixture until every berry is thoroughly coated.
Pour the vegetable broth and minced preserved lemon into the base of the tagine.
Add the seasoned pea eggplants to the liquid and cover the vessel tightly with a lid.
Bake the mixture for 25 minutes until the pea eggplants have softened and absorbed the flavors.
Remove the lid and switch the oven setting to a high broil.
Place the tagine under the broiler for 5 minutes until the surface is bubbly and slightly charred.
Garnish the hot dish with fresh cilantro before serving directly from the pot.
